money_flow_summary: Advertisers pay platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok) and publishers CPM/CPC to reach audiences; platforms skim 30-70% as intermediaries. Money flows from brand budgets through agencies into DSPs/SSPs, which auction ad inventory in milliseconds. The AI-agent opportunity is collapsing the agency layer — solo operators can now manage $1M+ ad budgets using automated bidding, creative generation, and performance reporting.

top_opportunities.title: AI Creative Studio for Meta/TikTok Ads (DTC Brands)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a system that ingests a brand's product catalog + past top-performing ads, generates 50+ ad creative variants per week using image generation + LLM copy, auto-uploads to Meta/TikTok Ads Manager via API, monitors performance, and kills underperformers. Charge DTC brands $500-$2,000/mo — replacing a $5k/mo creative agency.
top_opportunities.moat: Performance data creates flywheel — the more brands use it, the better the creative templates get
top_opportunities.first_step: Connect Meta Marketing API + Replicate/fal.ai for image generation; build 1-click 'generate 20 ad variants from product URL' demo
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates, tests, and iterates ad creative 10x faster than human designers — compressing a 2-week creative sprint into 2 hours

top_opportunities.title: Google Ads Automation Agency for Local Businesses (White-Label)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a Google Ads management platform that auto-creates campaigns from a business's Google Business Profile, generates keywords from their services, writes ad copy with LLM, and optimizes bids based on conversion data. Sell white-label access to local marketing agencies at $99/seat; they resell to their 50-200 clients at $299+/mo.
top_opportunities.moat: White-label distribution through agencies creates 1:N leverage; Google Ads API integration creates technical barrier
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Google Ads API sandbox integration; create white-label agency demo account; post in local marketing Facebook groups
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI writes hyper-local ad copy ('Emergency plumber in Fremont — 45 min response') without a human copywriter; automatically adjusts bids based on local competitor activity

top_opportunities.title: Programmatic Newsletter Ad Network for Niche Publishers
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Run a curated ad network for niche email newsletters (tech, finance, health). Advertisers pay $50-$500 CPM; take a 30% cut and pass 70% to newsletter operators. Use LLM to match ad creatives to newsletter audience + auto-write ad copy in each newsletter's editorial voice. Start with 10-20 newsletters, scale to 200+.
top_opportunities.moat: Network effects — advertisers prefer platforms with many newsletters; newsletter operators prefer platforms with many advertisers
top_opportunities.first_step: Recruit 10 niche newsletters on Substack/Beehiiv with 5k+ subscribers via cold email; pitch 5 B2B advertisers in those niches
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI automatically adapts ad copy to each newsletter's tone and audience, increasing click-through rates and making the network more valuable than generic ad networks

top_opportunities.title: Ad Attribution & ROAS Clarity Tool (Post-iOS 14 Era)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a first-party data attribution tool that combines Shopify order data, Meta CAPI events, Google Analytics 4, and post-purchase surveys into a unified ROAS model. Use statistical modeling to infer channel attribution where tracking breaks down. Sell to $500k-$10M/yr ecommerce brands at $199-$799/mo.
top_opportunities.moat: Historical attribution data creates switching cost; accuracy compounds as more conversion data is captured
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Shopify + Meta CAPI + GA4 connector; create demo dashboard with fake data; post in ecommerce Facebook groups and Shopify community
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI infers probabilistic attribution where deterministic tracking fails — solving a $50B/yr problem that rules-based attribution tools can't address
